metadata.description: Order-level sales facts including enterprise sales amount, region, customer, order date, discount, and product identifiers.
Customer dimension with account attributes, lifecycle stage, industry, geography, and segmentation fields.
Product catalog dimension with product hierarchy, category, SKU, launch date, and active status.
Date dimension for fiscal calendars, quarters, months, weeks, holidays, and relative reporting periods.
Support ticket facts with customer issue type, ticket status, priority, response time, resolution time, and satisfaction score.
Campaign performance metrics including channel, impressions, clicks, spend, leads, conversions, and campaign dates.
